title: Visual Overhaul
description: A mod pack that improves the vanilla game.
body:
**"Visual Overhaul"** is a unique mod pack created for those who want to enjoy the beauty of Minecraft without changing its gameplay. This mod pack transforms your world into a true visual fairy tale, adding detail, realism, and atmosphere while maintaining the spirit of the original game.

# Main Features:

**Dynamic Lighting and Shadows:** Adds realistic shadows and lighting effects that change depending on the time of day and weather conditions.

**Enhanced water and reflections:** The water becomes transparent, with realistic waves and reflections, creating the feeling of a real body of water.

**Advanced Shaders:** Includes shader support that adds volumetric lighting, bloom, motion blur, and other visual enhancements.

**Detailed nature:** Grass, leaves, flowers and trees look more vibrant and saturated, and new animations such as swaying foliage are added.

**Realistic sky and clouds:** The sky becomes deeper and more detailed, with voluminous clouds that slowly float across the sky.

**Improved particles and effects:** Rain, snow, fire, smoke and other effects look more realistic and add atmosphere to the game.

**Optimization:** Despite all the improvements, the mod pack is optimized to work on most computers so that everyone can enjoy the beauty of Minecraft.

# Who is this mod pack for?
For those who want to keep the original gameplay of Minecraft, but at the same time enjoy beautiful graphics.

For fans of screenshots and videos who want to capture the Minecraft world in all its glory.

For players who appreciate the atmosphere and visual component of the game.

Visual Overhaul is not just a mod pack, it's a new look at a familiar world. Immerse yourself in Minecraft as you have never seen it before!
